did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper developed a manual dermoscopic scoring system (BRAAFF checklist) based on predefined criteria evaluated by three independent human investigators. Statistical analysis was performed using univariate and multivariate logistic regression and ROC curves via SPSS software, but no AI, machine learning, or deep learning algorithms were used for image analysis or diagnosis.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
